description: Inspect, audit, and right-size your Azure Functions from the terminal — cold-start trends, config drift, and plan-fit answers the portal and az don't give you.

novel_features.name: Cold-start observatory
novel_features.description: See how often your functions cold-start and how slow those starts are, with the projected cost of moving to a Premium always-ready plan.

novel_features.name: Scaling & exec-drift trend
novel_features.description: Track instance scale-out and execution-time drift for an app over a time window, flagging when p95 duration creeps above baseline.

novel_features.name: Plan-fit recommendation
novel_features.description: Per-app recommendation of Consumption vs Premium vs Dedicated across a resource group, based on invocation density, cold-start sensitivity, and duration.

novel_features.name: Config-drift detector
novel_features.description: Diff app settings across function apps and their deployment slots, flagging settings present in one environment but not another and plaintext values that should be Key Vault references.

novel_features.name: Secret-sprawl audit
novel_features.description: Flag app settings holding raw secret values instead of @Microsoft.KeyVault references, plus stale or unused function keys.

novel_features.name: Invocation failure clustering
novel_features.description: Cluster recent invocation failures by function and exception type from Application Insights over a time window.

novel_features.name: Stale-function finder
novel_features.description: Find functions with zero invocations in the last N days as cleanup candidates.
